findings.message: Missing `alt` attribute on . Screen readers cannot describe the image content, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).
findings.suggestion: Add a descriptive `alt` attribute, e.g. `alt="Items catalogue banner"`. If the image is purely decorative, use `alt=""` to suppress it from the accessibility tree.

raw_text: ```json [ { "path": "frontend/src/Items.tsx", "line": 31, "severity": "high", "message": "Missing `alt` attribute on . Screen readers cannot describe the image content, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).", "suggestion": "Add a descriptive `alt` attribute, e.g. `alt=\"Items catalogue banner\"`. If the image is purely decorative, use `alt=\"\"` to suppress it from the accessibility tree." } ] ```
